template_data.headline_html: Five pricing errors before you submit.

items.title: No commercial price trail
items.sub: Basis of Award needs documentation — COs have full discretion without it

items.title: Rates above your commercial
items.sub: GSA requires Most Favored Customer pricing — charging a private client less is a violation

items.title: No escalation clause
items.sub: Flat rates lock you into stale labor costs for the full schedule term

items.title: Bundled services, no breakout
items.sub: Agencies can't order what they can't price line by line

items.title: Skipping price realism
items.sub: Too low = performance risk flag. Too high = no award. Both lose.

image_headline: FIVE PRICING ERRORS BEFORE YOU SUBMIT
image_prompt: Infographic checklist layout. Dark carbon background with cyan accent color, Space Grotesk typeface. Bold headline top: 'FIVE PRICING ERRORS BEFORE YOU SUBMIT'. Left side: illustrated professional man in dark suit jacket reviewing a printed proposal at a clean desk, focused expression. Right column: 5 checklist rows, each with a cyan checkmark icon and a short 3-word label — 'NO PRICE TRAIL', 'RATES TOO HIGH', 'NO ESCALATION CLAUSE', 'NO LINE ITEMS', 'SKIP REALISM CHECK'. Bottom dark banner with short callout: 'WRONG PRICE = MARGIN TRAP'. Clean professional illustration style. Footer text: 'Jason · GSA Focus'.
